features: Designed for Digital HD Reception : Receive clear Freeview broadcasting in Bedrooms, Lofts, living rooms and Vehicles
Magnetic Base enables you to place on a metal surface to increase Reception. Perfect for use with a vehicle
Compact & Lightweight Design : Perfect for Portable TV's, Multimedia Players, Freeview and Set Top Boxes
Supplied with Standard Coaxial Cable with no Mains power required. Ideal for use with all Digital Ready devices such as Freeview
Extra long 3 metre Coaxial cable - ideal for attaching to the roof of trucks, cars, campervans and motorhomes
description: From the manufacturer Mercury | Portable High Definition Freeview TV/DAB Radio Aerial For Indoor or Outdoor Use & with Magnetic Base Designed specifically for clear High Definition TV & DAB Radio reception. Our compact and lightweight aerial is perfect for portable TVs and laptop TV tuners. Its magnetic base enables you to use the surface area of large metal objects to enhance reception quality, making it perfect to use on the roof of a car, truck, campervan or motorhome. It could not be any simpler to install, with its 3m lead making positioning for the best signal quality a breeze. This small yet powerful high gain aerial is the perfect solution for both home and travel. IMPORTANT INDOOR AERIAL INFORMATION: Performance will always be based on your area (how far away you are from the local transmission tower. For weaker performing areas, we would always recommend the full install of a outdoor digital aerial PRODUCT FEATURES: Compact, portable and lightweight design that's ideal for travel and easy to position for ultimate signal performance Receives Digital Terrestrial TV broadcasts with ease The magnetic base means it can be placed on a metal surface to increase signal reach and reception Simple plug and play setup and operation Extra long 3m RF (Coaxial) lead - ideal for attaching to the roof of trucks, cars, campervans and motorhomes SPECIFICATION: Frequency range : UHF 470-862MHz Impedance 75 Ohms Gain 2-4 dB Cable : length 3m Dimensions 160 x 70 x 70mm Weight 100g BOX CONTAINS: 1 x UHF portable mast aerial with 3m lead 1 x User guide
